hero.headline: Scaling Disney-grade systems for real-world businesses.

founder.bio: Former Disney engineering lead turned tech whisperer for old-school businesses. I help family-run, blue-collar, and legacy industries leapfrog into digital with care and precision.

timeline.event: Engineering Leader at Motorola Solutions, modernizing legacy CCTV solutions
Led team at Amazon, modernizing driver communications technology
Joined Disney, transforming streaming for live sports and events
Founded my consultancy, bringing enterprise expertise to overlooked industries

testimonials.quote: The systems we built together saved us 20 hours per week in manual work. Our technicians can now focus on what they do best.
testimonials.author: Sarah Johnson

testimonials.quote: We tried expensive off-the-shelf software for years. Nothing worked until this custom approach that actually fits how our business operates.
testimonials.author: Michael Chen

testimonials.quote: Finally, someone who understands both cutting-edge tech AND the realities of running a construction business. The perfect bridge we needed.
